name: Stove Top Baked Beans
recipeInstructions:
1. Fry the bacon until crisp. Remove and set aside.
2. In the same pan, brown the onion and bell pepper in bacon grease.
3. Pour in the beans, brown sugar, mustard, and garlic powder. Mix well.
4. Add Worcestershire sauce and liquid smoke flavoring. Stir until the color darkens.
5. Crumble the cooked bacon and mix it into the dish.
6. Taste and adjust the sweetness by adding more brown sugar if needed.
7. Continue to simmer slowly on low heat, stirring often for 30 minutes.
8. The beans will thicken and sweeten with age. This recipe can be made ahead of time.
